title: Add squarespace integration
excerpt: We currently use monday to alert client’s of their available retainer hours. It would be awesome to be able to import reports from square instead of having to manually input them every time.

posts.author: Vijil (Victoria Leverton)
posts.cookedHtml: We currently use monday to alert client’s of their available retainer hours. It would be awesome to be able to import reports from square instead of having to manually input them every time.

posts.author: ChickpeaCatering (Chickpea Restaurant)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar question: We are working with Square Invoices and would like to be able to track when someone has paid their invoice either partially or fully. So for example if a payment is made through Square, Monday gets pinged and there’s a status change, or something like that.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ChickpeaCatering - you could accomplish this with a make.com scenario integrating square and monday. We have built this for similar financial softwares (Xero, Quickbooks, etc) and make does support Square so it is entirely possible.

Happy to help where we can!
Mark

Green Llamas
